TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cikadaan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 103 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Bunun 10%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 2%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cikadaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cikadaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cikadaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cikadaan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cikadaan hya' ga Nadan. tay mkyahu' na Cikadaan hya' ga Tapowaray. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Cikadaan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨika*aan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa na*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa tapowaraj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ ʦ~ʨika*aan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cikadaan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 103 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Bunun 10%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 2%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cikadaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cikadaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cikadaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cikadaan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cikadaan hya' ga Nadan. tay mkyahu' na Cikadaan hya' ga Tapowaray. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Cikadaan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨika*aan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa na*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨika*aan ħjaʔ ɣa tapowaraj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ ʦ~ʨika*aan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
